title: My Son-In-Law Stole My Memoir, Called Me A Fabricator. So I Bought His Publishing Company.
description: When my son-in-law forged my copyright, stole my memoir, and sold the film rights to a streamer, I lost everything. But I proved the forgery, self-published the true story, and watched it sell 200,000 copies. Now I own his publishing imprint, and his name is banned from print forever. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: THEY STOLE MY WORDS, SO I BOUGHT THEIR COMPANY

thumb_lines.text: I SPENT MY PENSION AND 20 YEARS WRITING HIS HEROIC MEMOIR
I PROVED HE FORGED THE DOCUMENTS
NOW I OWN HIS PUBLISHING HOUSE
